title: Stripe's Link Now Lets AI Agents Handle Your Payments
summary: Stripe has updated its Link digital wallet to allow AI agents to make purchases on your behalf with your approval. This could make online shopping and subscriptions easier and more secure.
body:
Stripe, a company that helps businesses handle online payments, has updated its digital wallet called Link. Now, AI agents can use Link to make purchases for you. You can connect your bank accounts, credit cards, and subscriptions to Link. Then, when an AI agent wants to make a purchase, you get a notification to approve or deny it.

This update matters because it could make online shopping and managing subscriptions easier. Imagine an AI assistant that can automatically renew your favorite streaming service or buy groceries for you, but only after you say it's okay. It's like having a personal shopper that always checks with you before making a purchase.

If you use Stripe's Link, you can start using this feature today. Just connect your payment methods and set up your AI agents. Keep an eye out for more AI assistants that can use this feature to make your life easier.
twitterThread: 💳 Big news for online shopping! Stripe's Link now lets AI agents handle your payments. Here's what you need to know:
Stripe's Link is a digital wallet that connects your cards, banks, and subscriptions. Now, AI agents can use it to make purchases for you.
In plain English: You get a notification to approve or deny any purchase an AI agent wants to make. Think of it like a personal shopper that always checks with you.

The part that matters: This could make online shopping and managing subscriptions easier. Imagine an AI assistant that can automatically renew your favorite streaming service or buy groceries for you.
If you use Stripe's Link, you can start using this feature today. Just connect your payment methods and set up your AI agents.
standaloneTweet: 💳 Stripe's Link now lets AI agents handle your payments with your approval. Imagine an AI assistant that can automatically renew your subscriptions or buy groceries for you, but only after you say it's okay!
